description: Admin banner drag-to-reorder with auto-animate and reorder API endpoint
steps: Create app/api/admin/banners/reorder/route.ts - POST endpoint that accepts { bannerIds: string[] } (Zod validated). Requires auth + product staff permission. Updates createdAt timestamps in sequence (newest first) so the banners display in the submitted order. Revalidates homepage and banners tags.

Create components/admin/banner-reorder-client.tsx - Client component that: fetches banners from /api/admin/banners, displays them as sortable cards with drag handles (using HTML5 drag-and-drop), applies @formkit/auto-animate for smooth animations, shows image thumbnail + title + active status, has Save Order button that POSTs to /api/admin/banners/reorder with the new ID order. Uses toast for success/error feedback.
Integrate banner reorder into admin settings or banner management page - Add the BannerReorderClient component to the admin banners section (check where banners are managed in admin pages)
acceptance_criteria: app/api/admin/banners/reorder/route.ts accepts array of banner IDs and reorders them
Reorder endpoint requires authentication and staff permission
Banner reorder client uses @formkit/auto-animate for animations (already installed)
Drag-and-drop reordering works with HTML5 drag API (no new packages)
Save button persists new order via API call
verification: Run npx eslint . from apps/web/ and confirm no errors
Run npm run test from apps/web/ and confirm all tests pass
